GitOntologyLoadingService.name: Remote GIT Repository
GitOntologyLoadingService.description: Load an ontology from a remote git repository

importForm.description: Specify the remote repository to clone

fields.repositoryUrl.title: Repository URL
fields.branch.title: Branch or Tag
fields.branch.description: (optional) Enter the exact branch or tag to clone or leave empty to clone the default branch
fields.username.title: Username
fields.password.title: Password
fields.authText.title: Authentication

webhookSettings.description: Configure webhook mapping entries for incoming HTTP events

conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.description: All conditions must match for this entry to apply

jsonPointer.title: JSON Pointer
jsonPointer.description: RFC 6901 pointer to the field in the incoming payload, e.g. /ref

regex.title: Pattern
regex.description: Regular expression tested (partially) against the value at the pointer

mappings.title: Mappings
mappings.description: Values to copy from the webhook payload to the target document

sourcePointer.title: Source Pointer
sourcePointer.description: JSON Pointer to the value in the incoming webhook payload

targetPointer.title: Target Pointer
targetPointer.description: JSON Pointer to the field in the target document to overwrite

valuePattern.title: Value Pattern
valuePattern.description: (optional) Regex to extract a match group from the source value. Defaults to .* (full value)
